title: Protocol for droplet DNA origami sample preparation (SOP-DPRP-001)
author: Simona, Bartkova
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Standard operating procedures (SOPs) for DNA origami folding and droplet encapsulation developed within 3D-BRICKS (GA #101099125). These protocols document the methodology for preparing DNA nanostructures in bulk and in droplets, including reagent preparation, thermal annealing cycles, gel electrophoresis verification, and droplet generation parameters. These data are useful for consortium partners performing DNA origami assembly and for the broader DNA nanotechnology and droplet microfluidics research communities.
